calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim
Off Calendar Jan-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

RULING: The Court adopts the tentative ruling. PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Order For Terminating Sanctions And Striking Claim is granted. The Court finds the motion was timely filed and was unopposed.

Judge: Barbara Zuniga; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner'S First Set Of Special Interrogatories And First Set Of Form Interrogatories; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Antonio Hernandez; Declaration Of Maite Kvarna; [Proposed Order]
Off Calendar Jun-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter.

Ruling: The tentative ruling is adopted as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion To Compel Answers To Petitioner's First Set Of Special Interrogatories And First Set Of Form Interrogatories is granted. No opposition filed. Responses to be served by July 12, 2024.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.
